calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jan-30-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:22am and concluding at 9:26am.

Plaintiff Ryan Connor Greenwald appearing represented by Jeffrey Wilens, Esq., via zoom.
Defendant 437 Hill Midrise, LLC not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Counsel for the Plaintiff, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Ryan Connor Greenwald, and against Defendant 437 Hill Midrise, LLC as follows:

Damages: $0
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $8,105.00
Costs: $671.00
Waiting Time Penalty: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $8776.00

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.
